profile.summary: IT Support Specialist with 2 years of professional experience in issue analysis, troubleshooting, user support, and incident management, primarily supporting C Tier Stakeholders and managing external IT requests at XXXLdigital. Participated in a hackathon programming a Job Skill matching platform using React and MongoDB. Additional academic and personal experience in software development using Java Spring, Angular, NestJS, and skills in online marketing and accounting automation. Multilingual and certified in Data Protection, Online Marketing, and ITILv4 Foundation.
